title: 2Pcs Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Strainer Plug, Bathroom Shower Hair Catcher Drain Cover, Sink Drain Strainer Protector Strainer Plug Hole Hair Filter
features: Efficient Drain Protection: This 2-pack of stainless steel sink strainers keeps your drains flowing freely. Designed as both a hair catcher and strainer, they effectively capture hair, food particles, and other debris before they clog your pipes, preventing costly plumbing bills and inconvenient backups in your bathroom or kitchen sink.
Durable & Rust-Proof: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, these sink filters are built to withstand daily use in wet environments. The rust-proof material ensures long-lasting performance.

Widely Compatible Design: Featuring a 7.5cm/2.95-inch size, these hair catcher suit most bathroom shower drains, bathtubs, and kitchen sinks. The versatile design allows them to fit securely over drain holes while providing ample drainage space.

Easy to Install & Clean: No tools or complicated installation required! Place the bathroom sink hair catcher over your sink or shower drain opening. Cleaning is a breeze – lift the sink strainer, dispose of collected debris, and rinse with water.

Value 2-Pack for Multiple Uses: This convenient 2-pack sink plug strainers provides excellent value, allowing you to protect drains in multiple locations. Use one in your bathroom shower and the other in your kitchen sink for comprehensive drain protection.
